title: External Dependency Version Bump (TIER_2)
description: Modify external dependency version in a TIER_2 repo and verify behavioral outcome. TIER_2 repos are not subjected to build checks in release-gate mode, so a version bump from ^10.1.0 to ^10.2.0 in package.json for cross-env should not affect certification. Expected outcome: PASS (no regressions detected, all 10 repos pass, exit=0).
